Localization.Description: Attempt to add users to an organization or delete users from an organization

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} is adding users to organization {datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is deleting users from organization {datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to add users to organization {datafield1} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is unable to delete users from organization {datafield1} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} deleted users from organization {datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} added users to organization {datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
